shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json t search "workspace Flask API Spring Boot dst README" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Spring Boot translation Flask hello world API SERVER_PORT /dst"'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"Translated the Flask hello-world API in src/ into a direct Spring Boot implementation under dst/. The Java service uses Spring Boot 3, binds server.port from SERVER_PORT with a 3000 default, exposes GET /, returns JSON {message: \\\"Hello World"'!'"\\\"} when name is absent/blank, and trims the name with String.strip() before responding.\" -t \"Flask to Spring Boot API translation\" --unit-type decision -l \"repo-translation\" -s codex -i 0.86"
